song.title: Tell Me the Old Old Story
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Tell me the old, old story, Of unseen things above, Of Jesus and His glory, Of Jesus and His love;|| Tell me the story simply, As to a little child, For I am weak and weary, And helpless and defiled.
[C] Chorus Tell me the old, old story, Tell me the old, old story, Tell me the old, old story, Of Jesus and His love.
[V2] 2) Tell me the story slowly, That I may take it in— That wonderful redemption, God’s remedy for sin;|| Tell me the story often, For I forget so soon, The early dew of morning Has passed away at noon.
[V3] 3) Tell me the story softly, With earnest tones and grave; Remember I’m the sinner Whom Jesus came to save;|| Tell me the story always, If you would really be, In any time of trouble, A comforter to me.
[V4] 4) Tell me the same old story, When you have cause to fear That this world’s empty glory Is costing me too dear;|| And when the Lord’s bright glory Is dawning on my soul, Tell me the old, old story: “Christ Jesus makes thee whole.”
song.author: Arabella Katherine Hankey
